'''hapodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:miasmology|miasmology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-p-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:miasmology|miasmology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hapodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæpedeth|hæpedeth]] || [[word:hæpedej|hæpedej]] || [[word:hæpedesh|hæpedesh]] || [[word:hæpede|hæpede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hapopodoth|hapopodoth]] || [[word:hapopodoj|hapopodoj]] || [[word:hapopodosh|hapopodosh]] || [[word:hapopodo|hapopodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hapodoth|hapodoth]] || [[word:hapodoj|hapodoj]] || [[word:hapodosh|hapodosh]] || [[word:hapodo|hapodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hapofdofth|hapofdofth]] || [[word:hapofdofj|hapofdofj]] || [[word:hapofdofsh|hapofdofsh]] || [[word:hapofdof|hapofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hapodotho|hapodotho]] || [[word:hapodojo|hapodojo]] || [[word:hapodosho|hapodosho]] || [[word:hapodoko|hapodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hapodoth|hapodoth]] || [[word:hapodoj|hapodoj]] || [[word:hapodosh|hapodosh]] || [[word:hapodo|hapodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hapodothol|hapodothol]] || [[word:hapodojol|hapodojol]] || [[word:hapodoshol|hapodoshol]] || [[word:hapodokol|hapodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hapodoothotho|hapodoothotho]] || [[word:hapodoojojo|hapodoojojo]] || [[word:hapodooshosho|hapodooshosho]] || [[word:hapodooko|hapodooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hapodothon|hapodothon]] || [[word:hapodojon|hapodojon]] || [[word:hapodoshon|hapodoshon]] || [[word:hapodokon|hapodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hapodothooro|hapodothooro]] || [[word:hapodojooro|hapodojooro]] || [[word:hapodoshooro|hapodoshooro]] || [[word:hapodokooro|hapodokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1da9d54}}
